import os
import pickle
from pathlib import Path

def main():
    ckpt_dir = Path("checkpoints/baseline")
    ckpt_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    model = {
        "type": "heuristic_utility_over_dist",
        "alpha": 2.5,
        "description": "Global heuristic: selects target node maximizing utility / (metric_dist ** alpha + 1) with alpha=2.5 (stronger dist penalty for lower travel), uses Dijkstra for accurate metric path cost and next-hop. COMPLETE robust predict.py with bugfix in fallback (neigh_raw), full eval_config.json + maps_eval handling (or proxy with 3 maps/type), per-episode try/except, exact JSON contract, per_type (success-only dist).",
        "version": "v6_alpha2.5_dijkstra_fixed"
    }
    with open(ckpt_dir / "model.pkl", "wb") as f:
        pickle.dump(model, f)
    print("Saved improved heuristic model to", ckpt_dir)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
